'''Mos Osnoe''' was a small [[City/Legends|city]] and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==History==
It was the site of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] commander [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] went to this city to meet [[Boorka]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], when the latter planned to [[First Battle of Tatooine|betray]] the Republic forces there.

Later, when the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] and his [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|troops]] intervened in the partnership between Boorka and the Confederacy, they [[Second Battle of Tatooine|drove out]] the Separatists from the Mos Osnoe region. During his stay in the city, Shen-Jon also helped the local authorities and citizens at the nearby [[Jundland Station]] to destroy a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] [[Unidentified Tusken Raider camp (Jundland Station)|camp]], not long after Tusken raids on Mos Osnoe.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
